---
title: "Building a Trading Analytics Platform in R Shiny"
description: "How I went from a simple Quarto document to a full ML-powered trading analytics application — the architecture, the challenges, and what I learned."
date: "2025-01-15"
categories: [R, Shiny, Trading, Machine Learning]
freeze: true
---

## Background

This is a template blog post. Replace with your own content.

When I first started tracking my trades with Nordnet, I was doing everything in spreadsheets. Then I moved to Quarto documents for reproducible analysis. Then Shiny, and then... it grew.

## The Architecture

*Write your post content here.*

```r
# Example code block — automatically styled
library(tidyverse)
library(xgboost)

# Your code here
```

## What I Learned

*Your insights here.*

## Conclusion

*Wrap up here.*
